content.en:
"Heavenly Phoenix Realm Divine !!!"

The Quinoa Realm God is extremely sad at the moment, he has a good relationship with the Tianfeng Realm God, and it can even be said that he was cultivated by the Tianfeng Realm God, and in the end, his strength surpassed that of the Tianfeng Realm God.

With their presence, the now powerful Tianhuo God Alliance has been developed, and it is listed as a top force.

But now, a mistake provoked the human race, causing the fall of the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God and the fall of other high-level Realm Gods.

Even, he may not be able to live.

This moment.

The Quinoa Fire Realm God was extremely desperate, but he also knew that Ye Tian would not be able to let him go, and he would not die until he killed to this extent.

So, he didn't ask for mercy, it didn't make any sense.

Bang!!!!!

The Quinoa Fire Realm God broke through frantically, but Ye Tian had many copy bodies and many means, which completely trapped him.

Gradually, the Quinoa Realm God couldn't hold on.

In the end, the Quinoa Fire Realm God also fell into Ye Tian's hands.

After killing these two high-level peak realm gods, Ye Tian took the Supreme Realm soldiers from them.

"These two high-level peak realm gods are rich in wealth, and there are four or five supreme realm soldiers alone. "

Among these Supreme Realm Soldiers 05, there are defensive Supreme Realm soldiers, and there are also offensive Supreme Realm soldiers, although there is some damage in the battle, but the damage is not serious, and it can be completely recovered.

With these Supreme Realm soldiers, after Ye Tian refines, his strength will inevitably increase a little.

However, at his current strength, one more Supreme Realm soldier and one less Supreme Realm soldier did not increase his strength much.

......

After these high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance fell, the realm gods of the human race dared to come over.

"Ancestor!"

These realm gods said respectfully.

At this moment, they looked at Ye Tian with great admiration, they didn't expect that so many high-level realm gods had been killed by Ye Tian, how terrifying this kind of strength was!

Of course, the stronger Ye Tian's strength, the safer they will be, so that they can get more benefits and protection!

"The corpses of these high-level realm gods, you dispose of them, and then restore the surrounding environment!"

Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes!"

Many gods of the human race world responded to the Tao.

Immediately, Ye Tian returned to the Terran Temple of the Terran Endless Realm Alliance.

At this time, Ye Xingchen came.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen shouted.

"Xingchen, so many high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance have fallen, and there are two high-level peak realm gods that have fallen, this matter has a great impact, but they are invading our human race, so after being killed, it is impossible for the Realm Court Headquarters to sanction our human race, but our human race and the Heavenly Fire God Alliance are completely enmity. "

Ye Xingchen asked suspiciously: "Father, it seems that the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance is only two high-level peak realm gods, these two high-level peak realm gods have fallen, and the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance can't threaten us, we don't need to be afraid of the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, right?"

Ye Tian shook his head and said, "You can't underestimate the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, there are at least dozens of high-level realm gods in the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, even if there are no high-level peak realm gods, there are at least six or seven high-level realm gods who have condensed the eight eternal realm spirits. Besides, the Realm Court Headquarters will definitely intervene, and it is impossible for me to destroy the Heavenly Fire God Alliance. Any top power will be sheltered by the Realm Headquarters, and they will not allow a top power to be destroyed so easily. In the case of not being able to destroy the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance uses the influence of the top forces to suppress our human race, but there is no problem. "

Ye Xingchen understood.

It is true that the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance cannot kill the Terrans, but the Terrans cannot kill the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, and in terms of influence, I don't know how many powerful forces there are under the command of the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, but there is nothing under the command of the Terrans.

Once the Heavenly Fire God Alliance suppresses the Terrans, it will cause a lot of trouble to the Terrans.

"Father, what should I do about it?" Ye Xingchen asked.

Ye Tian pondered for a while and said, "I'm not worried about myself and a few of you, but for ordinary human races, the suppression of the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance is indeed a trouble, but as long as the Terran advances to become a top force and has enough right to speak in the Boundary Court Headquarters, then even the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance will not be able to suppress the Terrans, and those powerful forces will not dare to assist the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance." "

"But if the human race wants to advance to the top power, it is still a little worse, and there is no way to gather ten mid-level peak realm gods in a short period of time!"

"Focus on cultivating a group of realm gods, provide unlimited resources, as for which realm gods to choose, you can do it. In short, at all costs, cultivate them to the peak realm god level of the middle realm!"

Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

...... []

The realm of the gods.

The headquarters of the Heavenly Fire Alliance.

At this moment, many high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance gathered together, and their faces were extremely angry.

"I just got the news that the Quinoa Fire Realm God and the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God have both fallen, and more than a dozen high-level Realm Gods have perished together. "

"Who did that?"

"Terran Ye Tian!"

"Isn't this a powerful force, how can it be to this extent?"

"The strength of the Terran Ye Tian is comparable to that of the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God, and the Terran Ye Tian has many clones comparable to the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God, so he besieged and killed the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God and the Quinoa Realm God, but Ye Tian's clones are also seriously injured, and it is estimated that they will not be able to form effective combat power in a short period of time. "

"But even so, if we all go up, we can't help Ye Tian!"

"Report to the Boundary Court Headquarters as soon as possible, and see if the Boundary Court Headquarters can sanction 133 Terrans!"

Immediately, the high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance jointly reported to the Realm Court Headquarters.

Soon, the Realm Court headquarters was alarmed.

However, Ye Tian was able to kill the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God and the Quinoa Fire Realm God, even so, the human race was not a top force, but it was even stronger than the top force, and many powerhouses in the Realm Court Headquarters did not want to offend Ye Tian.

Therefore, the Boundary Court Headquarters did not sanction Ye Tian, but promised to negotiate with Ye Tian to reconcile the Terran with the Heavenly Fire God Alliance.

this day.

The Realm Court Headquarters sent a high-level Realm God to the Terran Endless Realm Alliance to negotiate with Ye Tian.

Ye Tian discussed with this high-level realm god for a long time, and finally agreed to reconcile and no longer deal with the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, and the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance would no longer invade the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance.

But this is only a reconciliation on the surface, and the competition in the secret, and the headquarters of the Realm Court can't manage it.

In the following days, the Heavenly Fire God Alliance suppressed the business of the Terrans in all aspects through the powerful forces under its command, and even secretly harmed the Terran Realm Gods.

Ye Tian couldn't kill the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, so for this behavior, he could only kill the realm gods of the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance who attacked the human race as much as possible.

Gradually, the realm gods under the command of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance also fell a lot, but it was undoubtedly not suitable to fight with the Heavenly Fire God Alliance.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only hope that the ten middle-level peak realm gods of the human race would gather together and advance to the top forces.
